province.name: Province of Northumberland
assistant_gms: W. Bro. Dr. C. J. Ainsley PProvJGW

lodge.name: Percy Lodge
lodge.venue: Fern Avenue Masonic Centre, Jesmond, Newcastle upon Tyne NE2 2RA

ancient_charge: From Ancient Times no Master or Fellow could be absent from his Lodge especially when warned to appear at it, without incurring a severe censure, unless it appeared to the Master and Wardens that pure necessity hindered him.
